---
title: "Part Color Theme Test"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: book
    classoption: [twoside, 10pt]
    keep-tex: true
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{etoolbox}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{colortbl}
        \usepackage{mdframed}
        \usepackage{lipsum}

        % Part accent colors (mirrors preamble.tex)
        \colorlet{partI}  {blue}
        \colorlet{partII} {teal}
        \definecolor{partIII}{HTML}{267342}
        \definecolor{partIV}{HTML}{CC6600}    % burnt orange — darker than xcolor's orange

        % Active part color + tints (defaults to Part I before any \part fires)
        \colorlet{partcol}  {partI}
        \colorlet{partcol80}{partcol!80}
        \colorlet{partcol50}{partcol!50}
        \colorlet{partcol20}{partcol!20}

        % Switch partcol at each \part boundary.
        % Patch \@part (not \part) so the color change fires AFTER \cleardoublepage
        % has flushed pending pages — otherwise the last pages of the previous part
        % are output with the new part's color already set.
        \newcounter{partnum}
        \makeatletter
        \pretocmd{\@part}{%
          \stepcounter{partnum}%
          \ifcase\value{partnum}
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partI}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partII}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partIII}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partIV}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{black}%
          \fi
          \colorlet{partcol80}{partcol!80}%
          \colorlet{partcol50}{partcol!50}%
          \colorlet{partcol20}{partcol!20}%
        }{}{}
        \makeatother

        % Section headings in partcol (mirrors krantz SectionHeadFont)
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}  {\color{partcol}\large\bfseries\sffamily}{}{0em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\color{partcol}\normalsize\bfseries\sffamily}{}{0em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsubsection}{\color{partcol}\normalsize\itshape\sffamily}{}{0em}{}

        % Mirror krantz's PageNumFont, RunningHeadFont, and even/odd head layout.
        % even page: [page#]  chapter title ----
        % odd page:  ---- section title  [page#]
        % The key fix: \PageNumFont now sets \color{partcol} so even-page numbers
        % are colored even though \@the@page fires before \RunningHeadFont.
        \makeatletter
        \newcommand\PageNumFont{\reset@font\color{partcol}\fontsize{10}{12}\selectfont}
        \newcommand\RunningHeadFont{\color{partcol}\fontsize{10}{12}\itshape\selectfont}
        \def\@the@page{{\PageNumFont\thepage}}
        \def\ps@colorheadings{%
          \let\@oddfoot\@empty\let\@evenfoot\@empty
          \def\@evenhead{{\@the@page\RunningHeadFont\hfill\leftmark}}%
          \def\@oddhead{\RunningHeadFont\rightmark\hfill\PageNumFont\thepage}%
        }
        \AtBeginDocument{\pagestyle{colorheadings}}
        \makeatother

        % Colored rule helper
        \newcommand{\partrule}{%
          \textcolor{partcol}{\rule{\linewidth}{0.8pt}}}

        % "Key Point" box using mdframed
        \mdfdefinestyle{keypointbox}{%
          linecolor=partcol,
          linewidth=1.5pt,
          backgroundcolor=partcol20,
          innertopmargin=6pt,
          innerbottommargin=6pt,
          innerleftmargin=8pt,
          innerrightmargin=8pt,
          skipabove=8pt,
          skipbelow=4pt}
        \newenvironment{keypoint}{%
          \begin{mdframed}[style=keypointbox]%
          \textcolor{partcol}{\textbf{Key Point:}}\space
        }{\end{mdframed}}
---

## Color swatches

\medskip
\colorbox{partI!20}{\textcolor{partI}{\textbf{Part I — blue}}}
\colorbox{partII!20}{\textcolor{partII}{\textbf{Part II — teal}}}
\colorbox{partIII!20}{\textcolor{partIII}{\textbf{Part III — green}}}
\colorbox{partIV!20}{\textcolor{partIV}{\textbf{Part IV — burnt orange}}}
\colorbox{black!10}{\textcolor{black}{\textbf{End Matter — black}}}

\part{Part I — Orienting Ideas}

# Chapter 1

## Section heading (blue)

\partrule

\lipsum[1-4]

## Second section — check even page

\textbf{$\leftarrow$ The page number on the left (even page) should be blue.}

\lipsum[5-6]

\begin{keypoint}
Blue key point box. The border, background, and label use Part I blue.
\end{keypoint}

\part{Part II — Exploratory Methods}

# Chapter 2

## Section heading (teal)

\partrule

\lipsum[1-4]

## Second section — check even page

\textbf{$\leftarrow$ The page number on the left (even page) should be teal.}

\lipsum[5-6]

\begin{keypoint}
Teal key point box.
\end{keypoint}

\part{Part III — Univariate Linear Models}

# Chapter 3

## Section heading (green)

\partrule

\lipsum[1-4]

## Second section — check even page

\textbf{$\leftarrow$ The page number on the left (even page) should be green.}

\lipsum[5-6]

\begin{keypoint}
Green key point box.
\end{keypoint}

\part{Part IV — Multivariate Linear Models}

# Chapter 4

## Section heading (burnt orange)

\partrule

\lipsum[1-4]

## Second section — check even page

\textbf{$\leftarrow$ The page number on the left (even page) should be burnt orange (\#CC6600), visibly darker than xcolor's plain orange.}

\lipsum[5-6]

\begin{keypoint}
Burnt orange key point box.
\end{keypoint}

**Colored table header row:**

\medskip
\begin{tabular}{>{\columncolor{partcol20}}l r r}
\toprule
\rowcolor{partcol}
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Method}} &
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Value 1}} &
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Value 2}} \\
\midrule
Row one   & 1.23 & 4.56 \\
Row two   & 7.89 & 0.12 \\
Row three & 3.45 & 6.78 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\part{End Matter}

# Colophon

## Section heading (black)

\partrule

\lipsum[1-4]

## Second section — check even page

\textbf{$\leftarrow$ Page number and running heads should be BLACK here, not orange. This verifies the End Matter fix.}

\lipsum[5-6]
